tasting_rooms.name: Marche aux Vins
tasting_rooms.pricing: Self-guided cellar tastings from EUR 21; Climats and Grand Cru flights up to EUR 80 by reservation
tasting_rooms.description: Burgundy's best-known walk-in tasting cellar, set in the 15th-century Church of the Cordeliers opposite the Hospices de Beaune. Flights run from regional appellations up to Grand Cru in the vaulted cellars.

tasting_rooms.name: Caves Patriarche Pere et Fils
tasting_rooms.pricing: Self-guided cellar tour and tasting from EUR 20; reservations recommended online
tasting_rooms.description: Burgundy's largest cellars, five kilometres of vaulted galleries under Beaune holding around two million ageing bottles. Self-guided audio tour ends in a tasting of the Patriarche range.

tasting_rooms.name: Domaine Laroche L'Obediencerie
tasting_rooms.pricing: Guided tour and tasting by reservation; boutique tastings of Chablis crus during opening hours
tasting_rooms.description: Tasting cellars inside a former 9th-century monastery in Chablis, complete with a 13th-century press. Flights cover the Domaine Laroche Chablis, Premier Cru and Grand Cru range.

tasting_rooms.name: La Chablisienne Caveau de Chablis
tasting_rooms.pricing: Walk-in tastings at the caveau; structured flights of Petit Chablis through Grand Cru
tasting_rooms.description: The tasting cellar of the Chablis cooperative, pouring the full range from Petit Chablis to the Grand Cru climats including Les Clos and Chateau Grenouilles.

tasting_rooms.name: Cite des Climats et vins de Bourgogne Beaune Tasting Bar
tasting_rooms.address: 21 Avenue Charles de Gaulle, 21200 Beaune, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: Discovery trail plus tasting workshops from around EUR 25; by-the-glass at the wine bar
tasting_rooms.description: The Beaune flagship of the Cite des Climats network, with a tasting bar and workshop rooms running flights across the Cote d'Or, Chablis, Grand Auxerrois and Maconnais.

tasting_rooms.name: Sensation Vin
tasting_rooms.pricing: The Essentials from EUR 60; Premier vs Grand Cru EUR 100; Grand Cru Experience EUR 250
tasting_rooms.description: Dedicated Burgundy tasting room near the Hospices, founded 2006, running around 450 guided classes a year in French and English with blind-tasting and Grand Cru flights.

tasting_rooms.name: Place des Grands Crus
tasting_rooms.pricing: By-the-glass and guided flights of Premier Cru and Grand Cru Burgundy at the tasting counter
tasting_rooms.description: Tasting room and boutique on Place Carnot focused on Premier Cru and Grand Cru Burgundy, with by-the-glass pours and curated producer flights in the centre of Beaune.

tasting_rooms.name: Cite des Climats et vins de Bourgogne Macon Tasting Bar
tasting_rooms.address: 520 Avenue Marechal de Lattre de Tassigny, 71000 Macon, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: Discovery trail plus tasting workshops; wine bar pours of Maconnais appellations
tasting_rooms.description: The Macon site of the Cite des Climats network inside the renovated BIVB premises, telling the story of southern Burgundy along the Saone with a tasting bar of Maconnais whites.

verified.address_quoted: 520 av. Marechal de Lattre de Tassigny 71000, Macon

tasting_rooms.name: Cite des Climats et vins de Bourgogne Chablis Tasting Bar
tasting_rooms.address: 1 bis Rue de Chichee, 89800 Chablis, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: Discovery trail plus tasting workshops; wine bar pours of Chablis appellations
tasting_rooms.description: The Chablis site of the Cite des Climats network in the village centre, presenting the heritage of Chablis Chardonnay with a tasting bar pouring Petit Chablis through Grand Cru.

tasting_rooms.name: Cave des Hospices de Beaune
tasting_rooms.address: Place du General Leclerc, 21200 Beaune, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: Guided tastings of the Hospices cuvees; producer flights by reservation
tasting_rooms.description: Beaune tasting cellar specialising in the cuvees of the Hospices de Beaune estate, the wines sold each November at the historic charity auction, alongside other Cote d'Or producers.
